text:
[GENERAL]
# Merck Manual: Diabetes Mellitus

## SYMPTOMS

Polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss, sometimes with polyphagia, and blurred vision.
Patients are usually asymptomatic at early stages.

## DIAGNOSIS

Fasting plasma glucose (FPG) >= 126 mg/dL.
HbA1c >= 6.5%.

## TREATMENT

Diet and exercise.
Insulin.
Oral antihyperglycemics (e.g., Metformin).
